security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Workflow audio multipiste base sur FFmpeg
bundle.longDescription: Application desktop pour automatiser le workflow audio multipiste : import/analyse de WAV, renommage en bulk, traitements (gain, pan, reverb, merges) et export WAV/MP3/AAC via FFmpeg.
